case.title: MANGUS v. A. C. E. FREIGHT, INC.

opinion.h4: MANGUS v. A. C. E. FREIGHT, INC., (1967)
"> MANGUS v. A. C. E. FREIGHT, INC., ET AL. ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF CERTIORARI TO THE SUPREME COURT OF OHIO. No. 1260, Misc. Decided March 27, 1967.
opinion.p: Bruce B. Laybourne for respondent Freight Drivers, Dockworkers & Helpers, Local Union No. 24.

The motion for leave to proceed in forma pauperis and the petition for a writ of certiorari are granted. The judgment is vacated and the case is remanded to the Supreme Court of Ohio for further consideration in light of Vaca v. Sipes, ante, p. 171.
